texto: I closed the door. Other people got husbands and children
autor: I got a bag of lettuce. I hurled myself on the floor and sobbed. The worst thing about trying to get myself undepressed were the days when it seemed like I hadn’t made any progress at all.
explicacao: Citação de I got a bag of lettuce. I hurled myself on the floor and sobbed. The worst thing about trying to get myself undepressed were the days when it seemed like I hadn’t made any progress at all. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I closed the door. Other people got husbands and children” articula reflexao, debby-bull, closed em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
